title: Funsy MC
description: Relaxing survival mod pack with improved visuals and terrain generation faithful to Minecraft.
body:
![titre mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c03e80fc4ddb5de9ca680b85565c74188aef7b14.png)

# **Funsy MC**
**Rediscover survival with Funsy MC, a mod pack designed for a relaxing and immersive experience.**

Funsy MC subtly transforms Minecraft by improving the game's visual appearance and terrain generation, while respecting the essence of the original game. Ideal for players looking for a calming and captivating adventure.

## Key features:
- **Improved terrain generation**: Beautiful and varied landscapes that remain faithful to the spirit of Minecraft.
- **Aesthetic mods**: An enriched visual rendering for total immersion, without distorting the basic game.
- **Relaxing survival**: No scary or stressful mods, just a calm and pleasant atmosphere.
- **Optimized performance**: Works perfectly, even on modest configurations.

Fansy MC is perfect for survival enthusiasts who want to explore and build in a soothing and visually enriched environment.

## ⚠️Warning:
**On Beta versions, to fully enjoy the mod pack's custom interface, don't forget to enable the official resource pack in the options!**
